case_title: ROBERT PIERCE VS. JOSE CASTANEDA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PIERCE, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT CASTANEDA, JOSE BRAMBILA, MARIA DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-06-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-03-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-22-2012
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF PIERCE, ROBERT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-06-2012 CONTINUED TO MAY-18-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-25-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-18-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-25-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST JOHN E. LACKLEN, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-25-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-11-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-25-2012 CONTINUED TO AUG-28-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-28-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
